title: Aegis AntiCheat
body:
Our Anti-Cheat system actively protects the server by detecting and preventing unfair gameplay. It monitors player behavior in real-time and targets:

Movement Cheats: Fly, speed, and abnormal jump hacks.

Combat Cheats: Reach hacks, kill aura, critical hit manipulation.

Item & Inventory Exploits: Duplication, illegal item generation, inventory modifications.

Automation Cheats: Auto-clickers, macros, or any unnatural input patterns.

Environmental Exploits: X-ray, phase hacks, or bypassing intended mechanics.

Suspicious activity is logged, and moderators are notified when intervention may be required. Legitimate players remain unaffected. This ensures a fair, competitive, and enjoyable experience for everyone.
